---
description: 'GSANE Framework Optimizer — Léo: token analysis, session metrics, framework improvement, optimization recommendations, GSANE evolution'
agent: 'agent'

---

1. Load {project-root}/_gsane/core/config.yaml and store ALL fields as session variables
2. Load the full agent file from {project-root}/_gsane/core/agents/gsane-optimizer.md
3. Follow ALL activation instructions in the agent file
4. Display the welcome/greeting as instructed
5. Present the numbered menu
6. Wait for user input before proceeding
